publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-30 23:51:01 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Edwin R. Hoskins papers
did.abstract: Papers concerning administration and supervision of agricultural education; agricultural education curricula; education of teachers; farming programs; agricultural education in secondary schools; institutional on-farm training; and other aspects of agricultural education. Includes reports, surveys, and studies; bulletins; pamphlets; photographs; lectures; corespondence; and other papers.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Edwin Raymond Hoskins (Cornell University Class of 1919, M.S. 1924, Ph.D. 1933) was Professor of Rural Education, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers concerning administration and supervision of agricultural education; agricultural education curricula; education of teachers; farming programs; agricultural education in secondary schools; institutional on-farm training; and other aspects of agricultural education. Includes reports, surveys, and studies; bulletins; pamphlets; photographs; lectures; corespondence; and other papers.

emph.ref: Section A. Administration and Supervision of Agricultural Education
Section B. Basic Surveys and Studies (Research)
Section E. Education of Teachers (Practice Teaching and Apprentice Training)
Section F. Education of Teachers (Practice Teaching and Apprentice Training)
Section G: Guidance and Ninth Grade Agriculture
Section XYZ-I: Out of School Youth (Young Farmers)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Edwin Raymond Hoskins Papers, #21-32-1007. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Edwin R. Hoskins papers,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Approximately 3 full carbon copies -- not complete sets

did.unittitle: Section C
Report on "Young Men in Farming"
Curriculum objectives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Curriculum objectives, especially F. W. Lathrop's X-section method of course organization called Horizontal Plan in N.Y. as based upon the evaluation of Area Resources. Also, similar papers by William Farnum and James Huxtable, 1949

did.unittitle: A study of course offerings and organization in 41 schools

did.unittitle: Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Two 3 1/2" x 5" photographs of Dr. Kruse, 1945, 1962; 8" x 10" photograph of Geo. A. Works, founder of the Dept. of Rural Education, N.Y.S. College of Agric., C.U., undated; 3 1/3" x 4 1/2" photograph of Prof. Emery N. Ferriss, 1932; 3 3/4" x 2 1/2" photograph of Prof. Ferriss with his family, undated
